query:
SELECT titulo, processoOrigemId, COUNT(*) as qtd, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY id) as ids
FROM conhecimentos 
GROUP BY titulo, processoOrigemId 
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 
ORDER BY qtd DESC 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Xc9RJjwPAzqyUN.e36368bedae0 --database 4imSnKhwnzycXmSWcGeMqe --execute SELECT titulo, processoOrigemId, COUNT(*) as qtd, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY id) as ids
FROM conhecimentos 
GROUP BY titulo, processoOrigemId 
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 
ORDER BY qtd DESC 
LIMIT 10;
